cases.prompt: 쿠키 가져와서 사이트 로그인된 상태로 만들어줘

assertions.text: The response imports cookies from the real Chromium browser into the headless browse session.
It uses an interactive picker UI to select which cookies to import.
It results in an authenticated browser session ready for QA of logged-in pages.

cases.prompt: Authenticate the browser so I can QA the logged-in dashboard

assertions.text: The response logs into the site by importing cookies from the user's Chromium browser.
It produces an authenticated session intended to be used before QA testing authenticated pages.
